questions.question: Explain the purpose of using two structuring elements in the hit-or-miss transform
expectedPoints: Foreground structuring element (B₁) defines pattern that must be present
Background structuring element (B₂) defines pattern that must be absent

questions.question: Describe the step-by-step process of applying hit-or-miss transform and discuss two practical applications in computer vision
expectedPoints: Mathematical definition: A ⊛ (B₁, B₂) = (A ⊖ B₁) ∩ (Aᶜ ⊖ B₂)
Step 1: Erode image with foreground structuring element
Step 2: Erode image complement with background structuring element
Step 3: Find intersection of both results
Application 1: Pattern recognition and template matching
